use_cases: Collecting credit card payment information during e-commerce checkout flows
Capturing payment details for SaaS subscription signups and billing
Accepting card payments in fintech mobile and desktop applications
Verifying card authenticity using Luhn algorithm validation in real-time
Displaying masked card numbers for secure payment method management
ai_summary: A sophisticated credit card form component combining input fields and a visual card preview. Features real-time Luhn validation, digit masking for security, and customizable gradient accent rings. The component supports desktop and mobile platforms with a modern, colorful aesthetic. Includes live change callbacks and submit handling for seamless integration into e-commerce checkout, SaaS billing, or fintech payment flows.
